title: generate.py hard-codes device="cuda", crashes on CPU-only environments
body: generate() builds the tokens tensor with device="cuda" unconditionally. Trying to run inference/generate.py on a machine without a GPU raises a RuntimeError instead of falling back to CPU or giving an informative error up front.

title: Document the scale_fmt="ue8m0" option in act_quant
body: act_quant_kernel accepts a scale_fmt argument that rounds the scale to a power of two when set to "ue8m0", but there's no docstring explanation of when this format should be used versus the default linear scale.

title: fp8_cast_bf16.py conversion drops precision for small-magnitude weights
body: Converting a checkpoint with fp8_cast_bf16.py produces noticeably degraded outputs for a few layers with very small weight magnitudes. Suspect the block-wise dequantization scale clamp isn't fine enough for those blocks.

title: convert.py doesn't validate expected shard count against model config
body: Running convert.py against a checkpoint directory with a mismatched number of shard files fails deep inside tensor loading with a confusing shape error instead of failing fast with a clear message about the shard/model_parallel mismatch.

title: generate() recomputes attention over the full prefix every step
body: Looking at the decoding loop in generate(), each call to model.forward passes tokens[:, prev_pos:cur_pos] which suggests reliance on cached KV state in model.py, but performance profiling shows growing per-token latency similar to no caching. Please clarify or fix the caching path.
